reTestedAssertions.reason: Fix commit 473ec51 (skip KV cache fetch when prompt logprobs requested) resolves the issue. Prompt tokens now appear in logprobs for both fresh and cached prompts. Verified with 5 consecutive cache-hit requests — all returned 33 logprobs tokens (>= 27 prompt tokens) with prompt words ('The', ' capital', ' of', ' France', ' is') present in the first 27 entries.

Same fix as VAL-ECHO-002. Prompt + completion logprobs are now correctly concatenated. The logprobs array contains all prompt tokens followed by generated tokens in order. Token count is 33 (prompt 27 + completion 5 + 1 template token variance). Prompt word 'The' appears at index 4, within the first 27 prompt token positions.

notes: Round 2 re-tested only the 2 assertions that failed in round 1 (VAL-ECHO-002, VAL-ECHO-005). Both now pass after the KV cache fix (commit 473ec51). The fix skips KV cache lookup when echo or prompt_logprobs is requested, ensuring the full prefill path runs and prompt logprobs are captured. All 11 echo-prompt-logprobs assertions now pass.
